subject: WM-0177 ready for review
body: Implemented and verified seven caller-owned owner-surface product/test/export files within the unchanged cap of 12; source/allocation, 51 focused tests, M1/M2/M3 100000-tick hashes and quality 79 files/481 tests pass; one measured admission and exactly six no-retry benchmark commands at 3ca83d produce full 15 OK/0 WARN/0 FAIL, zero invariant mismatches and 20 same-host paired rows with maximum positive observed delta 4.7327094761608945 percent; hashed raw evidence and manifest 45D9E35E are committed with baseline/WM-0083 unchanged; WM-0170 remains blocked.
